---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a feature for REX
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Problem**
What problem does this solve? What's painful today?

**Proposed solution**
How should it work? Be specific.

**Which area?**
- [ ] CLI command
- [ ] Daemon / background service
- [ ] Memory / semantic search
- [ ] Provider / free tier routing
- [ ] Gateway (Telegram commands)
- [ ] Flutter app page
- [ ] Hub API endpoint
- [ ] Skills (Claude Code)
- [ ] Guards / hooks
- [ ] Docker / VPS deployment
- [ ] Other

**Priority signal**
- [ ] Blocks my daily workflow
- [ ] Nice to have
- [ ] Long-term / Phase 4

**Alternatives considered**
Other approaches you've thought about.
